idea-plugin.name: AI Code Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
AI Code Assistant

Select any code, right-click, and get an instant AI explanation — without leaving your IDE.

Features

  • 🔍 Explain code: Select code → right-click → Ask AI
  • 🔄 Switch providers anytime from the right-click menu
  • 🔑 Your API key stays local — never uploaded or shared

Supported Providers

  • OpenAI (ChatGPT) — gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-3.5-turbo
  • Google (Gemini) — gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-1.5-pro
  • Anthropic (Claude) — claude-3-5-sonnet, claude-3-haiku
  • DeepSeek — deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner
  • Moonshot (Kimi) — moonshot-v1 series
  • ZhipuAI (GLM) — glm-4-flash, glm-4-plus
  • Custom — any OpenAI-compatible endpoint

Getting Started

After installation, a setup wizard will guide you to choose a provider and enter your API key.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Support for 6 AI providers + custom endpoints
  • Onboarding wizard on first install

action.description: Ask AI to explain the selected code
Change AI provider or API key
